## Thanks for wanting to contribute to YT Zero

I genuinely appreciate the time and care behind a pull request. For most
changes, though, please **open an issue first** and describe the idea before
writing code.

This project is currently developed issue-first: it lets us discuss the
problem, agree on the scope, and shape the design before anyone spends time on
an implementation that may not fit the project direction. I am happy to work
through the approach in the issue and then review a PR when we have agreed on
the direction.

## Related issue

Closes #

## What changed?

Briefly describe the problem and the change you made.

## How did you test it?

List the checks you ran or the behaviour you verified.
